Molokai Golf Courses

1 course on the Friendly Isle. Authentic Hawaiian golfing experience.

PublicMedium

Ironwood Hills Golf Club

Kualapuu

Only 9-holes on Molokai Island. Elevated green with mountain and ocean views. Local volunteer maintained. Friendly small-town atmosphere.

Par 352,850 yds
View Course
